title: stachys sanguinea
intro: Stachys sanguinea, also known as betony, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The plant has been known to provide health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep, and alleviating headaches and fever. Betony can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
